headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on Healthpeak Properties, Raises Price Target to $20
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst John Kilichowski   maintains Healthpeak Properties (NYSE:DOC) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $18 to $20.
